svg.title: One-Click Environment Provisioner — End-to-End Architecture
svg.desc: A top-to-bottom pipeline showing all four layers: trigger, Terraform infrastructure, GitOps platform via FluxCD, Jenkins CI/CD, and observability.
svg.text: State: S3 backend + DynamoDB lock · Remote state · Idempotent re-apply

g.text: idempotent · EKS ready check → FluxCD install

svg.text: FluxCD GitOps — Platform Layer (git push → reconcile → apply)
Flux Notification Controller → Slack alert on any sync failure or suspension
Jenkins CI/CD — Application Pipeline (6 gated stages)
Stage 6 polls HelmRelease status · fail if not healthy in 5 min · green = app confirmed running

g.text: scoped IAM per ServiceAccount via OIDC

svg.text: Every layer version-controlled · auditable · idempotent · self-healing
